---
title: "test_fitting"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/test_fitting.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_fitting.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `test_fit_xyey_tanh` {#test_fit_xyey_tanh}

```python
def test_fit_xyey_tanh()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_fitting.py#L8){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_polynomial_fit_xyey_linear` {#test_polynomial_fit_xyey_linear}

```python
def test_polynomial_fit_xyey_linear()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_fitting.py#L26){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_polynomial_fit_xyey_quadratic` {#test_polynomial_fit_xyey_quadratic}

```python
def test_polynomial_fit_xyey_quadratic()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_fitting.py#L40){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_fit_xiyey` {#test_fit_xiyey}

```python
def test_fit_xiyey()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_fitting.py#L54){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
